name: Waste Collection Schedule
description: Shows the next waste collection dates from an ICS/iCal feed or manual recurring schedules.

nativeSettings.title: Waste Collection
nativeSettings.recurringRules:
Residual waste | WEEKLY | 2 | 2026-01-05 | MO
Paper | WEEKLY | 4 | 2026-01-12 | MO
Organic waste | WEEKLY | 1 | 2026-01-07 | WE
Recycling | WEEKLY | 2 | 2026-01-09 | FR

configVariants.title: Waste Collection
configVariants.recurringRules:
Residual waste | WEEKLY | 2 | 2026-01-05 | MO
Paper | WEEKLY | 4 | 2026-01-12 | MO
Organic waste | WEEKLY | 1 | 2026-01-07 | WE
Recycling | WEEKLY | 2 | 2026-01-09 | FR

configVariants.title: Abfallkalender
configVariants.recurringRules:
Restmüll | WEEKLY | 2 | 2026-01-05 | MO
Biomüll | WEEKLY | 1 | 2026-01-07 | WE
Papiertonne | WEEKLY | 4 | 2026-01-12 | MO
Gelbe Tonne | WEEKLY | 2 | 2026-01-09 | FR

icsUrl.title: ICS/iCal URL
icsUrl.description: Optional calendar URL from your municipality or waste service provider.

manualDates.title: Manual dates
manualDates.description: One per line: YYYY-MM-DD | Type | optional note.

recurringRules.title: Recurring rules
recurringRules.description: One per line: Type | WEEKLY | interval | start YYYY-MM-DD | weekday, e.g. Paper | WEEKLY | 4 | 2026-01-12 | MO.

excludedDates.title: Excluded dates
excludedDates.description: Comma or line separated dates to remove. Use YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD | Type.

includeTypes.title: Include types
includeTypes.description: Optional comma-separated waste types to keep.

excludeTypes.title: Exclude types
excludeTypes.description: Optional comma-separated waste types to hide.
